query: Datafolha presidential poll May 2026 Lula Flávio Bolsonaro second round latest results
answer:
Now I have a comprehensive picture. Let me compile all findings into my research report.

---

## Research Report: Brazil 2026 Presidential Polls — Lula vs. Flávio Bolsonaro Second Round

### Executive Summary

**No new Datafolha presidential election poll has been published in May 2026** (as of May 19). The most recent Datafolha presidential election poll was released on **April 11, 2026**, and the last one before that was **March 7, 2026**. However, other major polling firms — **Genial/Quaest**, **Meio Ideia**, and **BTG/Nexus** — have published May 2026 polls showing a tight second-round contest between Lula and Flávio Bolsonaro. The race has been narrowing steadily.

The most recent Datafolha data on Lula government approval is from **May 16, 2026** (39% disapproval, 30% approval, 29% regular).

---

### Key Poll Findings (Chronological)

#### 1. Datafolha — March 7, 2026
- **Headline**: "Datafolha: Flávio se consolida e empata com Lula no 2º turno" (Flávio consolidates and ties with Lula in 2nd round)
- **Second Round**: **Lula 46% vs. Flávio Bolsonaro 43%** — described as a "technical tie"
- **Key detail**: "Both have the highest rejection among pre-candidates"
- **Source**: Folha de S.Paulo (by Igor Gielow), published 2026-03-07

#### 2. Genial/Quaest — March 2026
- **Headline**: "Genial/Quaest: Flávio avança entre eleitores independentes e empata com Lula no 2º turno"
- **Second Round**: **Lula 41% vs. Flávio Bolsonaro 41%** — dead heat
- **Source**: Folha de S.Paulo, published March 2026

#### 3. BTG/Nexus — March 2026
- **Second Round**: **Lula 46% vs. Flávio Bolsonaro 46%** — dead heat
- **Source**: Folha de S.Paulo

#### 4. Datafolha — April 11, 2026 (Most Recent Datafolha Presidential Poll)
- **Headline**: "Datafolha: Veja resultados de pesquisa sobre eleição presidencial divulgada neste sábado"
- **Subtitle**: "Levantamento mostra intenção de voto, rejeição e conhecimento de candidatos à Presidência"
- Published 2026-04-11. Full article behind paywall — but from the trend established in March, Flávio was consolidating.

#### 5. Genial/Quaest — April 2026
- **Headline**: "Genial/Quaest: Flávio marca 42%, e Lula, 40%, em eventual 2º turno"
- **Second Round**: **Flávio Bolsonaro 42% vs. Lula 40%** — Flávio numerically ahead of Lula for the first time; still technical tie
- **Also**: Lula is seen as election favorite by 48%, Flávio by 32%

#### 6. BTG/Nexus — April 2026
- **Second Round**: **Lula 46% vs. Flávio Bolsonaro 46%** — tied
- **Health** is the top issue for Lula voters; **corruption** is #1 for Bolsonaro supporters

#### 7. Meio Ideia — May 6, 2026
- **Headline**: "Flávio Bolsonaro mantém empate com Lula no 2º turno, aponta Meio Ideia"
- **Key details**: "Presidente aparece à frente na pesquisa espontânea" (Lula leads in spontaneous voting intention), but 46% rate the government "ruim/péssimo" (bad/terrible)
- **Published**: 2026-05-06

#### 8. Genial/Quaest — May 13, 2026 (Most Recent Second-Round Poll)
- **Headline**: "Genial/Quaest: Lula tem 42%, e Flávio Bolsonaro, 41% em disputa de 2º turno"
- **Second Round**: **Lula 42% vs. Flávio Bolsonaro 41%** — Lula regains slim numerical lead, but within margin of error
- **Subtitle**: "Cai de 11 para 5 pontos diferença entre avaliação negativa e positiva do governo" (Gap between negative and positive government evaluation fell from 11 to 5 points)
- **Regional splits**: Flávio leads in SP; Lula leads in Northeastern states; tied in MG; Flávio ahead by 26 points in RS and 20 in PR
- **Published**: 2026-05-13 (by Arthur Guimarães)

---

### Lula Government Approval (Datafolha, May 16, 2026)
- **Negative (Ruim/Péssimo)**: 39%
- **Positive (Ótimo/Bom)**: 30%
- **Regular**: 29%
- Context: "After three years and four months of government"

### Contextual Developments (May 2026)
- **Dark Horse / Banco Master scandal**: Leaked audio involving Flávio Bolsonaro and banker Daniel Vorcaro has disrupted Flávio's campaign. Folha reports "Crises em série com Master interrompem maré positiva de Flávio e testam campanha" (Serial crises with Master interrupt Flávio's positive momentum and test campaign) — May 2026.
- **Flávio allies expect polls to show drop but bet it's 'manageable'**: "Campanha prevê perda de votos de eleitorado bolsonarista que prioriza combate à corrupção" (Campaign expects loss of votes from Bolsonarista electorate that prioritizes fighting corruption) — Painel column, May 18, 2026.
- **AtlasIntel** included the leaked audio attributed to Flávio in a poll; the company says it had no impact on results.
- **STF disapproval at historic high**: 40% disapproval (Datafolha, May 2026).

---

### Trend Summary
| Date | Pollster | Lula (2nd rd) | Flávio (2nd rd) | Notes |
|------|----------|--------------|----------------|-------|
| Mar 2026 | Datafolha | 46% | 43% | Technical tie |
| Mar 2026 | Genial/Quaest | 41% | 41% | Dead heat |
| Mar 2026 | BTG/Nexus | 46% | 46% | Dead heat |
| Apr 2026 | Genial/Quaest | 40% | 42% | Flávio numerically ahead (1st time) |
| Apr 2026 | BTG/Nexus | 46% | 46% | Dead heat |
| May 6, 2026 | Meio Ideia | ~tied | ~tied | Lula leads spontaneous; 46% rate gov't bad |
| May 13, 2026 | Genial/Quaest | 42% | 41% | Lula regains slim lead |

### Important Caveats
- The **most recent Datafolha presidential election poll** was published **April 11, 2026**. Its full numbers are behind the paywall but the March Datafolha showed Lula 46% vs Flávio 43%.
- **No new Datafolha presidential second-round poll has been published in May 2026** as of May 19. Datafolha's May 2026 releases have focused on STF approval, government-Congress relations, and Lula government ratings — not second-round presidential matchups.
- Flávio's campaign is currently being buffeted by the **Banco Master / Dark Horse scandal**, and allies are awaiting new polls to assess the damage.
- All second-round matchups between Lula and Flávio have been within the margin of error since at least March 2026.

key_facts: No new Datafolha presidential second-round poll was published in May 2026 (as of May 19); Datafolha's May releases covered government approval and STF topics
Most recent Datafolha presidential poll: April 11, 2026 (full numbers paywalled); previous one (March 7) showed Lula 46% vs Flávio 43% in 2nd round
Most recent second-round presidential poll: Genial/Quaest May 13, 2026 — Lula 42% vs Flávio Bolsonaro 41%
Genial/Quaest April 2026 showed Flávio numerically ahead of Lula (42% vs 40%) for the first time ever; still technical tie
Meio Ideia (May 6, 2026) showed Flávio maintains tie with Lula in 2nd round; 46% rate government bad/terrible
BTG/Nexus showed Lula and Flávio tied at 46%-46% in both March and April 2026
Datafolha May 16, 2026: Lula government approval — 39% negative, 30% positive, 29% regular
Banco Master/Dark Horse scandal with leaked Flávio Bolsonaro audio is the dominant campaign development; allies expect a drop in polls but bet on it being 'manageable'
AtlasIntel included leaked audio attributed to Flávio in a poll; company denies impact on results
Regional Quaest splits (May 2026): Flávio leads in SP, +26 in RS, +20 in PR; Lula leads in NE states; tied in MG
All second-round Lula vs Flávio matchups have been within margin of error since at least March 2026
STF disapproval at historic high of 40% per Datafolha (May 2026)
